name: macctl
description: macOS CLI for controlling system settings (volume, screen, etc.) via AppleScript

scripts.lint: biome lint src scripts package.json tsconfig.json
scripts.format: biome format --write src scripts package.json tsconfig.json
scripts.check: biome check src scripts package.json tsconfig.json
scripts.check:fix: biome check --write src scripts package.json tsconfig.json
